modules.name: Troubleshooting Methodology
modules.description: Structured troubleshooting processes for enterprise IT environments, including problem identification, theory testing, and documentation.

modules.name: Troubleshooting System Startup and Recovery
modules.description: Diagnosing boot failures, using Safe Mode and recovery tools, performing system resets, and restoring from backups.

lessons.title: Diagnosing Startup Issues
topics: Common causes of boot failures and boot loops

lessons.title: Performing System Recovery
topics: System reset with file retention vs. factory reset

modules.name: Troubleshooting Group Policy
modules.description: Diagnosing Group Policy Object failures, using gpresult and RSOP, and resolving inheritance and filtering issues.

lessons.title: Group Policy Issues
topics: GPO application failures and common causes
RSOP.msc and Event Viewer for GPO diagnosis

modules.name: Troubleshooting Hardware and Performance
modules.description: Diagnosing hardware device and driver issues, performance bottlenecks, and using monitoring tools like Task Manager and Resource Monitor.

lessons.title: Troubleshooting Hardware Devices and Drivers
topics: Updating, rolling back, and reinstalling drivers
Using sfc /scannow for system file integrity

lessons.title: Troubleshooting Performance Issues
topics: CPU, RAM, disk, and process bottlenecks

modules.name: Troubleshooting Network and Remote Connectivity
modules.description: Diagnosing network connectivity issues using ipconfig, ping, tracert, netstat, and troubleshooting VPN and RDP failures.

lessons.title: Remote Connectivity Troubleshooting
topics: Split tunneling and DNS resolution over VPN

modules.name: Troubleshooting Logon, Access, and Security Issues
modules.description: Resolving account lockouts, permissions failures, malware detection, firewall conflicts, and BitLocker issues.

lessons.title: Troubleshooting Logon and Resource Access
topics: Mapped drive failures and GPO drive mapping
whoami, net use, and gpresult for diagnosis

modules.name: Troubleshooting Operating Systems and Applications
modules.description: Diagnosing OS-level failures, service dependencies, update issues, application crashes, compatibility settings, and reinstallation.

lessons.title: Troubleshooting OS Issues
topics: SFC and DISM for system file repair

assessment.title: Troubleshooting/Supporting in an Enterprise Environment Assessment
items: Quiz: Troubleshooting Hardware Devices and Drivers
Quiz: Troubleshooting Logon and Resource Access
